data.title: iWallet Unveils Milestone in Next-Gen Product Development
data.description:
iWallet ( (IWAL) ) has issued an update.

On April 3, 2025, iWallet Corporation announced a significant milestone in the development of its next-generation products, the iWallet 2.0 and iPassport, with final production prototypes expected by the end of the second quarter of 2025. These products, crafted from aerospace-grade titanium, feature advanced biometric authentication, Bluetooth tracking, and RFID-blocking technology, marking a leap forward in security-focused accessories for modern lifestyles. The company’s engineering team includes talent from major tech brands, ensuring superior build quality. iWallet plans to launch a new website featuring detailed product showcases and investor resources.

More about iWallet

iWallet Corporation (IWAL) is dedicated to creating premium, security-focused accessories that blend innovative design with advanced technology. The company’s products are engineered to meet the needs of the modern, mobile consumer, offering unparalleled protection and functionality.

YTD Price Performance: 240.0%

Average Trading Volume: 61,025

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $2.65M

data.title: EuroGroup Laminations Appoints Designated Representative for Shareholders’ Meeting
data.description:
An update from EuroGroup Laminations S.p.A ( (IT:EGLA) ) is now available.

EuroGroup Laminations S.p.A. has appointed Computershare S.p.A. as its Designated Representative for the upcoming shareholders’ meeting on May 5, 2025. This appointment allows Computershare to collect and manage voting instructions, ensuring that shareholder votes are accurately represented and executed during the meeting, potentially impacting the company’s governance and decision-making processes.

More about EuroGroup Laminations S.p.A

EuroGroup Laminations S.p.A. operates in the manufacturing industry, focusing on producing laminated products. The company is involved in providing solutions for various market segments, leveraging its expertise in laminations to cater to diverse industrial needs.

data.title: Polaris Renewable Energy Schedules Q1 2025 Earnings Call
data.description:
Polaris Infrastructure ( (TSE:PIF) ) has issued an update.

Polaris Renewable Energy Inc. has announced its Q1 2025 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast scheduled for May 1, 2025. This event will provide insights into the company’s financial performance and strategic direction, potentially impacting its operations and positioning in the renewable energy sector.

More about Polaris Infrastructure

Polaris Renewable Energy Inc. is a Canadian publicly traded company focused on the acquisition, development, and operation of renewable energy projects in Latin America and the Caribbean. The company’s portfolio includes a geothermal plant, run-of-river hydroelectric plants, solar photovoltaic projects, and an onshore wind park, contributing to the energy transition.

data.title: Lloyds Banking Group Executes Major Share Buyback
data.description:
An announcement from Lloyds Banking ( (LYG) ) is now available.

On April 4, 2025, Lloyds Banking Group plc announced the purchase of 54,856,241 of its ordinary shares from Morgan Stanley & Co. International plc as part of its ongoing share buyback program. The transaction, executed under previously issued instructions, aims to enhance shareholder value by reducing the number of outstanding shares, and the company plans to cancel these shares. This strategic move is expected to positively impact the company’s market position and shareholder returns.

More about Lloyds Banking

Lloyds Banking Group plc is a major financial services group in the United Kingdom, providing a wide range of banking and financial services. The company focuses on retail and commercial financial services, serving millions of customers across the UK with a variety of products including personal and business banking, insurance, and investment services.

data.title: Ivanhoe Mines to Announce Q1 2025 Production Results Amid Market Volatility
data.description:
An update from Ivanhoe Mines ( (TSE:IVN) ) is now available.

Ivanhoe Mines is set to release its first quarter 2025 production results for its Kamoa-Kakula Copper Complex and Kipushi Mine in the Democratic Republic of the Congo on April 7, 2025. Despite a strong start to the year for both projects, the company has noted a recent decline in its share price, attributing it to general market volatility rather than any specific material events.

More about Ivanhoe Mines

Ivanhoe Mines is a Canadian mining company focused on advancing its three principal projects in Southern Africa, including the Kamoa-Kakula Copper Complex and the Kipushi zinc-copper-germanium-silver mine in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, and the Platreef palladium-nickel-platinum-rhodium-copper-gold project in South Africa. The company is also exploring its extensive exploration licenses in the Western Forelands for new sedimentary copper discoveries.

YTD Price Performance: -30.79%

Average Trading Volume: 283,262

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $11.22B

data.title: Maven Income and Growth VCT 3 Completes Successful Share Subscription
data.description:
The latest update is out from Maven Income and Growth VCT 3 ( (GB:MIG3) ).

Maven Income and Growth VCT 3 PLC announced the successful closure of its subscription offer for new ordinary shares, raising over £2 million for the 2024/2025 tax year. This issuance increases the total number of shares to over 137 million, with the new shares expected to commence trading on the London Stock Exchange by 9 April 2025. The closing of this offer strengthens the company’s capital base, potentially enhancing its investment capabilities and market positioning.

More about Maven Income and Growth VCT 3

Maven Income and Growth VCT 3 PLC operates in the financial services industry, focusing on venture capital trusts. The company provides investment opportunities primarily through the issuance of ordinary shares, targeting investors looking for growth and income through diversified portfolios.

data.title: Wheaton Precious Metals Announces 2025 Shareholder Meeting with Virtual Access
data.description:
The latest update is out from Wheaton Precious Metals ( (TSE:WPM) ).

Wheaton Precious Metals Corp. has announced its 2025 Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders, scheduled for May 9, 2025. The company is implementing a notice and access model for delivering its information circular, encouraging shareholders to access materials electronically. The meeting will cover key issues such as the election of directors, appointment of auditors, and a say on executive compensation. The adoption of an online virtual meeting platform alongside an in-person meeting location highlights Wheaton’s commitment to accessibility and shareholder engagement.

More about Wheaton Precious Metals

Wheaton Precious Metals Corp. operates in the precious metals industry, focusing on the acquisition and management of precious metal streams. The company is primarily engaged in the business of silver and gold streaming, offering investors a way to gain exposure to precious metals without the operational risks associated with mining.

data.title: Beazley PLC Advances Share Repurchase Program with Latest Buyback
data.description:
Beazley ( (GB:BEZ) ) has shared an update.

Beazley PLC announced the purchase and cancellation of 537,000 of its ordinary shares as part of its ongoing share repurchase program. This move, facilitated by J.P. Morgan Securities, is part of a broader strategy to enhance shareholder value, having repurchased a total of 8,771,949 shares since the program’s announcement in March 2025. The share buyback is expected to positively impact the company’s market positioning by reducing the number of shares in circulation, potentially increasing earnings per share and demonstrating confidence in the company’s financial health.

More about Beazley

Beazley PLC operates in the insurance industry, providing a range of insurance products and services. The company is known for its focus on specialty insurance markets and has a strong presence in the Lloyd’s of London insurance market.

data.title: goeasy Ltd. Celebrated as a Top Workplace in Canada for 2025
data.description:
goeasy ( (TSE:GSY) ) has shared an update.

goeasy Ltd. has been recognized on the 2025 Best Workplaces in Canada list for the second consecutive year, highlighting its commitment to an employee-centric and inclusive culture. This recognition, based on direct employee feedback, underscores goeasy’s investment in creating a supportive environment where employees can thrive, as evidenced by a record-high engagement score and additional accolades for being a top workplace for women and having trusted executive teams. The acknowledgment reinforces goeasy’s strategy of investing in its workforce to drive customer satisfaction and business success.

More about goeasy

goeasy Ltd. is a Canadian company headquartered in Mississauga, Ontario, specializing in non-prime leasing and lending services through its brands easyhome, easyfinancial, and LendCare. The company offers a range of financial products and services, including unsecured and secured installment loans, merchant financing, and lease-to-own merchandise. Customers can access these services through an omnichannel model comprising online platforms, over 400 locations across Canada, and point-of-sale financing in various verticals. With over 2,500 employees, goeasy has served over 1.5 million Canadians and originated over $16 billion in loans.

data.title: Olidata S.p.A. Announces Major Governance Restructuring
data.description:
Olidata S.p.A. ( (IT:OLI) ) has issued an announcement.

Olidata S.p.A. held a Shareholders’ Meeting and a Board of Directors meeting, resulting in significant changes to its governance structure. The number of directors was increased from 5 to 9, and four new directors were appointed, including Cristiano Rufini as the new Executive President. The Board also reorganized its internal committees and redefined the delegations within the administrative body. These changes aim to enhance the company’s operational efficiency and ensure continuity in its growth path, following a period of internal audits and restructuring.

More about Olidata S.p.A.

Olidata S.p.A. is a leading system integrator in Italy’s IT sector with shares listed on Euronext Milan, managed by Borsa Italiana S.p.A.
